name: ＜JUNG KOOK: I AM STILL＞ THE ORIGINAL
original_name: ＜JUNG KOOK: I AM STILL＞ THE ORIGINAL
overview: Despite his natural talent and remarkable achievements that followed, Jung Kook continues to chart his own course. This documentary covers his first solo single debut to unreleased interviews, exclusive behind-the-scenes footage, and the full version of "Jung Kook ‘GOLDEN' Live On Stage."
